Returns OCR result and document info

post.description: Sends a human approval signal to the document's workflow. When rejecting, rejectionReason is required.

requestBody.description: Approval decision and optional reviewer info, comments, rejection reason, annotations

200.description: Approval signal sent successfully

400.description: Invalid request (e.g. rejection without rejectionReason, or document has no workflow execution)

200.description: Returns the list of workflows owned by the authenticated user

get.summary: List all workflows for the current user

requestBody.description: Workflow name, optional description, and graph configuration

201.description: Workflow created successfully. Returns the created workflow with id, version, and timestamps.

400.description: Invalid request body or workflow config validation failed

200.description: Returns the workflow

requestBody.description: Partial workflow data (name, description, and/or config). Only provided fields are updated.

200.description: Workflow updated successfully. Returns the updated workflow.

400.description: Invalid request body or workflow config validation failed

201.description: Document uploaded successfully. Returns document id, title, file info, status, and created_at.

info.title: Document Intelligence Platform API
info.description: Comprehensive REST API for document processing, OCR, workflow orchestration, model training, and human-in-the-loop review

expires_in.description: Seconds until the new access token expires

preferred_username.description: Keycloak preferred username or IDIR username

expires_in.description: Seconds until the current access token expires

roles.description: Roles inherited from the creating user at key generation time
Roles inherited from the creating user at key generation time

approved.description: Whether the document is approved (true) or rejected (false)

rejectionReason.description: Required when approved is false. Reason for rejecting the document.

userId.description: ID of the user who owns the workflow

schemaVersion.description: Schema version for the workflow config

labelingDocumentId.description: Labeling document ID to add to project

polygon.description: Polygon points as array of numbers [x1,y1,x2,y2,...]

span.description: Span information from OCR for ordering

field_key.description: Field key this label belongs to

replaceAll.description: Whether to replace all existing labels

fields.description: Extracted key-value pairs with confidence scores

total.description: Total number of documents matching the filter

totalDocuments.description: Total documents in the review queue

averageConfidence.description: Average confidence score across all documents

valid.description: Whether the project has sufficient labeled data for training

labeledDocumentsCount.description: Number of labeled documents in the project

minimumRequired.description: Minimum number of labeled documents required

issues.description: List of validation issues preventing training

sasUrl.description: SAS URL for blob storage access

blobCount.description: Number of blobs uploaded for training

modelId.description: Azure model ID once training completes

trainingJobId.description: Training job that produced this model

fieldCount.description: Number of fields the model recognizes
